zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Maelog於1228年出生在威爾士格拉莫爾根時，她的父親Sir Ralph Maelog25歲，母親Lady Joan Ferch Rhys21歲。她於1252年與Hywel ap Cynwrig在威爾士布雷康史爾布雷孔結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Maelog于1228年出生在威尔士格拉莫爾根时，她的父亲Sir Ralph Maelog25岁，母亲Lady Joan Ferch Rhys21岁。她于1252年与Hywel ap Cynwrig在威尔士布雷康史爾布雷孔结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Maelog was born in 1228, in Glamorgan, Wales, her father, Sir Ralph Maelog, was 25 and her mother, Lady Joan Ferch Rhys, was 21. She married Hywel ap Cynwrig in 1252, in Brecon, Breconshire, Wales. They were the parents of at least 4 sons.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Maelog est née en 1228, à Glamorgan, Galles, son père, Sir Ralph Maelog, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Lady Joan Ferch Rhys, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Hywel ap Cynwrig en 1252, à Brecon, Breconshire, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Maelog 1228 in Glamorgan, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Ralph Maelog 25 und ihre Mutter Lady Joan Ferch Rhys 21. Sie hat 1252 in Brecon, Breconshire, Wales Hywel ap Cynwrig geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Maelogが1228年にウェールズグラモーガンで生まれた時，父Sir Ralph Maelogは25歳，母Lady Joan Ferch Rhysは21歳であった。1252年にウェールズブレコンシュアイアブレコンでHywel ap Cynwrigと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Maelog(이)가 1228년 웨일스 글램르건에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Ralph Maelog(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Joan Ferch Rhys(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1252년 웨일스 브레콘실르 브레콘에서 Hywel ap Cynwrig(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Maelog родилась в 1228 г. в местности глэморган, Уэльс, её отцу по имени Sir Ralph Maelog было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Joan Ferch Rhys, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hywel ap Cynwrig в 1252 г. в местности брекон, брекуншир, Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Maelog nació en 1228, en Glamorgan, Gales, su papá, Sir Ralph Maelog, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Lady Joan Ferch Rhys, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Hywel ap Cynwrig en 1252, en Brecon, Breconshire, Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos.
